breaking.title_zh: 苹果支付2.5亿美元和解Siri AI功能延迟诉讼
breaking.title_en: Apple to Pay $250M to Settle Lawsuit Over Siri's Delayed AI Features
breaking.summary_zh: 苹果公司同意支付2.5亿美元和解因Siri AI功能延迟推出的集体诉讼。此案凸显了科技巨头在AI承诺与实际交付之间的法律风险。
breaking.summary_en: Apple agrees to pay $250M to settle class-action lawsuit over delayed Siri AI features. The case highlights legal risks for tech giants between AI promises and actual delivery.

breaking.title_zh: AI热潮推动三星市值突破1万亿美元
breaking.title_en: AI Boom Pushes Samsung to $1 Trillion Valuation
breaking.summary_zh: 受AI芯片需求激增推动，三星电子市值突破1万亿美元大关，成为亚洲第二家达到此里程碑的科技企业。其HBM内存和先进制程订单已排至2027年。
breaking.summary_en: Driven by surging AI chip demand, Samsung Electronics market cap breaks $1 trillion, becoming Asia's second tech company to reach this milestone. HBM memory and advanced process orders booked through 2027.

daily.title_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资估值或达450亿美元
daily.title_en: DeepSeek Could Hit $45B Valuation from First Investment Round
daily.excerpt_zh: 中国AI独角兽DeepSeek正在进行首轮融资，估值可能高达450亿美元。其低成本高性能的推理模型正在全球范围内挑战OpenAI和Anthropic的主导地位。
daily.excerpt_en: Chinese AI unicorn DeepSeek is in its first funding round with potential $45B valuation. Its low-cost high-performance reasoning models are challenging OpenAI and Anthropic's dominance globally.

daily.title_zh: 谷歌AI搜索新增Reddit等社区引用功能
daily.title_en: Google Updates AI Search to Include Quotes from Reddit and Other Sources
daily.excerpt_zh: 谷歌更新AI搜索体验，开始在AI概览中引用Reddit等社区平台的真实用户观点。这一举措旨在解决AI搜索结果被指'过于 polished、缺乏真实人类视角'的批评。
daily.excerpt_en: Google updates AI search to cite real user opinions from Reddit and community platforms in AI overviews. The move addresses criticism that AI search results are 'too polished and lack authentic human perspective'.

daily.title_zh: 马斯克如何离开OpenAI？Greg Brockman首次详细披露内幕
daily.title_en: How Elon Musk Left OpenAI, According to Greg Brockman
daily.excerpt_zh: OpenAI联合创始人Greg Brockman首次详细披露了马斯克2018年离开公司的内幕。据其描述，马斯克曾提议接管OpenAI并担任CEO，遭拒绝后离开并转而创办xAI。
daily.excerpt_en: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman details Elon Musk's 2018 departure. Musk reportedly proposed taking over OpenAI as CEO; after rejection, he left and later founded xAI.

daily.title_zh: AI评估平台Braintrust确认数据泄露，要求所有客户轮换密钥
daily.title_en: AI Evaluation Startup Braintrust Confirms Breach, Tells Every Customer to Rotate Keys
daily.excerpt_zh: AI模型评估平台Braintrust确认遭遇安全入侵，攻击者获取了敏感客户数据。公司已通知所有客户立即轮换API密钥和访问凭证，影响范围仍在评估中。
daily.excerpt_en: AI model evaluation platform Braintrust confirms security breach. Attackers accessed sensitive customer data. All customers advised to immediately rotate API keys and credentials.

daily.title_zh: SAP豪掷11.6亿美元收购德国18个月大AI实验室NemoClaw
daily.title_en: SAP Bets $1.16B on 18-Month-Old German AI Lab NemoClaw
daily.excerpt_zh: 德国软件巨头SAP以11.6亿美元收购成立仅18个月的AI实验室NemoClaw。该实验室专注于企业AI智能体技术，SAP计划将其整合进S/4HANA Cloud产品线。
daily.excerpt_en: German software giant SAP acquires 18-month-old AI lab NemoClaw for $1.16B. The lab focuses on enterprise AI agent technology; SAP plans integration into S/4HANA Cloud product line.

daily.title_zh: Meta收购机器人初创公司，加码人形AI机器人布局
daily.title_en: Meta Buys Robotics Startup to Bolster Humanoid AI Ambitions
daily.excerpt_zh: Meta低调收购一家专注于人形机器人控制的AI初创公司，交易金额未披露。此前Meta已宣布组建新团队开发'通用人形机器人'，与特斯拉Optimus形成直接竞争。
daily.excerpt_en: Meta quietly acquires an AI startup focused on humanoid robot control. Meta previously announced a new team to develop 'general-purpose humanoid robots', directly competing with Tesla Optimus.

daily.title_zh: 五角大楼与英伟达、微软、AWS签约部署机密网络AI
daily.title_en: Pentagon Inks Deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, AWS to Deploy AI on Classified Networks
daily.excerpt_zh: 美国国防部与三大云/芯片巨头签订协议，在机密军事网络中部署AI系统。合作涵盖AI模型训练、推理基础设施和边缘部署，标志着军事AI进入规模化应用阶段。
daily.excerpt_en: US Department of Defense signs agreements with three cloud/chip giants to deploy AI on classified military networks. Cooperation covers AI model training, inference infrastructure and edge deployment.

daily.title_zh: 谷歌、英伟达押注40亿美元自学习AI公司，目标'替代科学家'
daily.title_en: Google & Nvidia Back $4B Self-Learning AI Company Aiming to 'Replace Scientists'
daily.excerpt_zh: 获得谷歌和英伟达投资的自学习AI公司估值已达40亿美元。该公司开发的AI系统能够自主设计实验、分析数据并得出结论，目标是自动化科学研究流程。
daily.excerpt_en: Self-learning AI company backed by Google and Nvidia reaches $4B valuation. Its AI system can autonomously design experiments, analyze data and draw conclusions, aiming to automate scientific research.
